case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA)N.A. VS. FRANK G DANIELE et al

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA)N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA)N.A.'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT TO FILE AND SERVE ITS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 3, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 20, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT TO FILE AND SERVE ITS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT PREVIOUSLY CONTINUED THE MOTION FROM MAY 17, 2013, TO ENABLE THE MOVING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THAT ORDER. THEREFORE, THE MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR. LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File And Serve Its First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S Motion For Leave Of Court To File And Serve Its First Amended Complaint is off calendar. The Court previously continued the motion from May 17, 2013, to enable the moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. The moving party failed to comply with that order. Therefore, the motion is off calendar. Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File And Serve Its First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Continued To Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA)N.A.'s Motion For Leave Of Court To File And Serve Its First Amended Complaint IS Continued to June 3, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 20, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)
